title: Admin Dashboard & Data Management App
description: Build a production-ready admin dashboard with role-based access, data tables, CRUD operations, and full observability — from project init to deployment.

steps.description: Initialize a Next.js project with App Router and TypeScript
Add Tailwind CSS v4 for utility-first styling
Install shadcn/ui for data tables, dialogs, forms, and charts
Add Clerk for authentication with organization and role support (admin vs member)
Set up Drizzle ORM for type-safe database access and schema migrations
Add Zod for server action and form schema validation
Add Upstash Redis for API rate limiting and server-side caching of expensive queries
Add Sentry for error tracking and performance monitoring
Add Vitest for unit testing server actions and utilities
Configure CI/CD with type checking, lint, and test gates
Deploy to Vercel with environment variables configured
